name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Terminal Server Client Connection History Cleared - Registry
notes:
This Building Block detects the deletion of registry keys containing the MSTSC connection history.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Terminal Server Client Connection History Cleared - Registry
SIGMA Description: Detects the deletion of registry keys containing the MSTSC connection history

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Terminal Server Client Connection History Cleared - Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%DeleteValue%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client\Default\MRU%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%DeleteKey%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client\Servers\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Terminal Server Client Connection History Cleared - Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%DeleteValue%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client\Default\MRU%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%DeleteKey%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\Microsoft\Terminal Server Client\Servers\%') AQL filter query
